claims.claim: An accuracy sweep across five agent accuracy levels (0.40–0.95, 1,500 tasks each) confirms that the proof-obligation policy consistently eliminates false accepts under the synthetic verifier model, though it introduces a rejected-all rate (tasks where no agent produces a valid claim) that is highest when agent accuracy is low (0.1633 at accuracy 0.40).
